path: Reference Notes/Hussein Nasser/Udemy - Fundamentals of Database Engineering/--Attachments/bloom-filter.pdf
text:
# Page 1^page=1
Bloom filters Why should I learn yet another thing? husseinnasser.com

# Page 2^page=2
Does this username exist? GET /username?q=paul Slow..

# Page 3^page=3
Does this username exist? - Cache? GET /username?q=paul Inefficient, memory..

# Page 4^page=4
Does this username exist? Bloom filter GET /username?q=paul Hash(paul) % 64 = 3 1 1... 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 62 63

# Page 5^page=5
Does this username exist? Bloom filter GET /username?q=jack Hash(jack) % 64 = 63 1 1... 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 62 63

# Page 6^page=6
Create user bloom filter POST /username?q=jack Hash(jack) % 64 = 63 ... 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 62 63 1

# Page 7^page=7
Create user bloom filter POST /username?q=paul Hash(paul) % 64 = 3 1... 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 62 63 1

# Page 8^page=8
Create user bloom filter POST /username?q=Tim Hash(Tim) % 64 = 63 1 1... 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 62 63

# Page 9^page=9
Create user bloom filter POST /username?q=Ali Hash(ali) % 64 = 4 1 1... 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 62 63 1
